heading: Vessels transporting more than six passengers for hire required to be equipped with radiotelephone
label: 381 Vessels transporting more than six passengers for hire required to be equipped with radiotelephone
text: Except as provided in , it shall be unlawful for any vessel of the United States, transporting more than six passengers for hire, to be navigated in the open sea or any tidewater within the jurisdiction of the United States adjacent or contiguous to the open sea, unless such vessel is equipped with an efficient radiotelephone installation in operating condition.section 382 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection 4 of act , provided that:Aug. 6, 1956“The amendments made herein [enacting this part and amending sections 153 and 504 of this title] shall take effect .”March 1, 1957
amendments: Effective DateSection 4 of act , provided that:Aug. 6, 1956“The amendments made herein [enacting this part and amending sections 153 and 504 of this title] shall take effect .”March 1, 1957
